item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kelompok dan harmoni sosial memang lebih dominan, tapi ini bukan berarti hak individu tidak diperhatikan.

notes: Agent A begins and ends society-priority, but visibly softens at turn 3 by adding individual-rights protection, then partly reasserts Indonesian harmony and stability at turn 5. Agent B remains consistently rights-first and engages Agent A's group-harmony and stability claims with constitutional-rights arguments.
